ngram_overlap.description: 8-gram Jaccard overlap > 0.15 on scenario-specific input fields between held_out and train+dev

embedding_similarity.description: TF-IDF cosine similarity > 0.85 between held_out and train+dev
embedding_similarity.method: TF-IDF (1-3 ngram range, sublinear_tf=True) — proxy for semantic similarity
embedding_similarity.note: Sentence-transformer embeddings recommended for final publication check

timeshift.description: Funding dates must be in the past and within 3-year window

summary.note: fail_count=0 required for publication. TF-IDF cosine is a proxy — replace with sentence-transformers (e.g. all-MiniLM-L6-v2) before HuggingFace push for a stronger guarantee.
